response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong individual-contributor engineering fundamentals across distributed systems and backend architecture, this role requires a CTO with demonstrated executive leadership at scale and production multi-agent AI systems expertise. He has no evidence of leading engineering teams of 10-30+ people, no fintech infrastructure background, and his agentic AI exposure is recent (3 months) and focused on tooling/infrastructure rather than production system architecture. The seniority and domain gaps are too large to overcome through interview.
strengths: 19 years of software engineering with solid backend/distributed systems experience: event streaming, microservices, databases, real-time systems
Strong software craftsmanship culture emphasis: TDD, clean code, testing frameworks demonstrate engineering discipline
Recent exposure to agentic AI work including MCP code generators and agent infrastructure at current role
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or team scaling—all roles appear to be individual contributor or small-team IC positions; job requires leading 10-30+ person organization
Zero fintech domain expertise; role is fintech-specific and requires deep knowledge of credit systems, payment flows, liquidity management, and regulated financial operations

Agentic AI production systems experience is minimal and very recent (3 months at current role); appears focused on tooling/infrastructure rather than designing and operating production multi-agent architectures
